title: Phase III Study of Novel Diabetes Treatment
location: San Francisco, CA; Los Angeles, CA; Seattle, WA
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 18-75 years; Diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes for at least 6 months; HbA1c between 7.0-10.5%; Currently taking metformin. Exclusion Criteria: Type 1 diabetes; Severe kidney disease; Pregnancy; History of diabetic ketoacidosis.
primary_outcome: Change in HbA1c from baseline to 24 weeks

title: Immunotherapy for Early-Stage Breast Cancer
location: Boston, MA; New York, NY; Philadelphia, PA
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Female patients aged 18-70; Histologically confirmed breast cancer Stage I-III; ECOG performance status 0-1; Adequate organ function. Exclusion Criteria: Metastatic disease; Previous immunotherapy; Autoimmune disorders; Pregnancy or breastfeeding.

title: Cognitive Enhancement Study for Alzheimer's Disease
location: Los Angeles, CA; San Diego, CA; Phoenix, AZ
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 55-85 years; Mild to moderate Alzheimer's disease; MMSE score 10-24; Stable medications for 3 months; Caregiver available. Exclusion Criteria: Other forms of dementia; Severe depression; Recent stroke; Inability to undergo MRI.

title: Asthma Control with Biologic Therapy
location: Miami, FL; Tampa, FL; Orlando, FL
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 12-65 years; Severe persistent asthma; Elevated eosinophils or IgE; Poor control despite optimal therapy; FEV1 <80% predicted. Exclusion Criteria: COPD; Active smoking; Recent respiratory infection; Pregnancy.

title: Cardiovascular Prevention in Diabetes
location: Boston, MA; New York, NY; Chicago, IL
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 40-80 years; Type 2 diabetes; High cardiovascular risk; Stable on current medications. Exclusion Criteria: Recent heart attack or stroke; Severe heart failure; Dialysis; Life expectancy <2 years.

title: Gene Therapy for Sickle Cell Disease
location: Houston, TX; Atlanta, GA; Nashville, TN
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 12-50 years; Confirmed sickle cell disease (HbSS or HbS-beta0); History of at least 2 vaso-occlusive crises per year; Adequate organ function. Exclusion Criteria: Prior gene therapy; Active infection; Pregnancy; Severe organ damage.
primary_outcome: Reduction in vaso-occlusive crises at 12 months

eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 30-75 years; eGFR 20-60 mL/min; Albuminuria (UACR >= 200 mg/g); On stable ACE inhibitor or ARB therapy. Exclusion Criteria: Type 1 diabetes; Polycystic kidney disease; Prior kidney transplant; Active urinary tract infection.
location: Dallas, TX; Denver, CO; Kansas City, MO
primary_outcome: Change in eGFR slope over 2 years
title: SGLT2 Inhibitor for Chronic Kidney Disease
PD-1 Checkpoint Inhibitor for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
location: Portland, OR; Sacramento, CA; Salt Lake City, UT
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 18-80 years; Histologically confirmed NSCLC Stage IIIB-IV; PD-L1 expression >= 50%; ECOG 0-1; No prior immunotherapy. Exclusion Criteria: Active autoimmune disease; Brain metastases; Systemic corticosteroid use; Active hepatitis B or C.

title: Mindfulness-Based Intervention for Chronic Pain
location: Minneapolis, MN; Milwaukee, WI; Indianapolis, IN
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 25-65 years; Chronic pain for >= 6 months; Average pain intensity >= 4 on NRS; Failed at least 2 prior treatments. Exclusion Criteria: Active substance abuse; Severe psychiatric disorder; Pending litigation related to pain; Current opioid use > 90 MME/day.
primary_outcome: Change in pain intensity (NRS) at 12 weeks

title: CAR-T Cell Therapy for Relapsed Lymphoma
location: New York, NY; Philadelphia, PA; Baltimore, MD
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 18-70 years; Relapsed or refractory DLBCL after >= 2 prior therapies; ECOG 0-1; Adequate organ function; CD19-positive disease. Exclusion Criteria: Prior CAR-T therapy; Active CNS lymphoma; Uncontrolled infection; Autoimmune disease requiring systemic therapy.

title: GLP-1 Agonist for Obesity and Metabolic Syndrome
location: Chicago, IL; Detroit, MI; Cleveland, OH
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 18-65 years; BMI >= 30 kg/m2 or >= 27 with comorbidity; At least 1 metabolic syndrome component; Failed lifestyle intervention. Exclusion Criteria: Type 1 diabetes; History of pancreatitis; Bariatric surgery; MEN2 syndrome; Pregnancy.
primary_outcome: Percent change in body weight at 52 weeks

title: Targeted Therapy for Advanced Melanoma
location: Austin, TX; San Antonio, TX; Phoenix, AZ
eligibility_criteria: Inclusion Criteria: Age 18-80 years; Unresectable Stage III or IV melanoma; BRAF V600E/K mutation positive; ECOG 0-2; Measurable disease per RECIST 1.1. Exclusion Criteria: Prior BRAF/MEK inhibitor therapy; Active brain metastases; Severe hepatic impairment; Retinal vein occlusion history.
